name: Generic Ingestion Pipeline
description: Reads CSV files from GCS landing bucket and loads to BigQuery ODP tables (customers, accounts, decision, applications).

parameters.name: entity
parameters.label: Entity type
parameters.helpText: Generic entity to process: customers, accounts, decision, or applications.

parameters.name: source_file
parameters.label: Source file GCS path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to the input CSV file (e.g. gs://project-generic-int-landing/generic/customers/file.csv).

parameters.name: output_table
parameters.label: BigQuery output table
parameters.helpText: BigQuery output table in project:dataset.table format.

parameters.name: error_table
parameters.label: BigQuery error table
parameters.helpText: BigQuery error table in project:dataset.table format.

parameters.name: run_id
parameters.label: Pipeline run ID
parameters.helpText: Unique identifier for this pipeline run.

parameters.name: gcp_project
parameters.label: GCP Project ID
parameters.helpText: GCP project ID for job control tracking.
